requirement_topic.en: OCPP Readiness, EMC, and Power-Quality Evidence

summary.en: Eswatini has a nascent EV charging market, so OCPP requirements are likely to be project-, operator-, or tender-driven rather than a single published national EVSE protocol mandate. Networked public chargers should nevertheless be prepared for OCPP back-office interoperability, remote monitoring, metering data exchange, fault reporting, and load management. EMC and power-quality evidence should be based on IEC 61000-family testing and coordinated with EEC requirements for the connection point.
summary.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼电动汽车充电市场仍处早期，因此OCPP要求很可能由具体项目、运营商或招标驱动，而非单一已发布的全国EVSE协议强制规定。尽管如此，联网公共充电桩仍应准备OCPP后台互操作、远程监控、计量数据交换、故障报告和负荷管理能力。EMC和电能质量证据应基于IEC 61000系列测试，并与EEC接入点要求协调。
summary.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼電動汽車充電市場仍處早期，因此OCPP要求很可能由具體項目、運營商或招標驅動，而非單一已發布的全國EVSE協議強制規定。儘管如此，聯網公共充電樁仍應準備OCPP後台互操作、遠程監控、計量數據交換、故障報告和負荷管理能力。EMC和電能質量證據應基於IEC 61000系列測試，並與EEC接入點要求協調。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office interoperability
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
ESERA electricity-sector oversight where network operation or tariff issues arise

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly implement GB/T 27930-2023 between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. That vehicle-to-charger CAN protocol is not a substitute for OCPP back-office interoperability, and it is not compatible with CCS2 / IEC communication requirements. China domestic EMC reports may need reassessment against IEC 61000 test plans, local supply conditions, and the EEC connection point.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常在非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间实施GB/T 27930-2023。该车桩CAN协议不能替代OCPP后台互操作，也不兼容CCS2 / IEC通信要求。中国国内EMC报告可能需要按照IEC 61000测试计划、本地供电条件和EEC接入点重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常在非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間實施GB/T 27930-2023。該車樁CAN協議不能替代OCPP後台互操作，也不兼容CCS2 / IEC通訊要求。中國國內EMC報告可能需要按照IEC 61000測試計劃、本地供電條件和EEC接入點重新評估。

standards_or_laws: China domestic EMC test reports where available

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version and cybersecurity expectations in the Eswatini project specification, test remote monitoring and fault reporting with the intended charge-point operator, prepare IEC 61000 EMC and harmonic evidence, and document load-management functions for the EEC connection point. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation is not ready for networked public charging projects.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认埃斯瓦蒂尼项目规范中的OCPP版本和网络安全预期，与目标充电点运营商测试远程监控和故障报告，准备IEC 61000 EMC及谐波证据，并记录EEC接入点的负荷管理功能。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且没有OCPP实现的充电桩，不适合联网公共充电项目。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認埃斯瓦蒂尼項目規範中的OCPP版本和網絡安全預期，與目標充電點運營商測試遠程監控和故障報告，準備IEC 61000 EMC及諧波證據，並記錄EEC接入點的負荷管理功能。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且沒有OCPP實現的充電樁，不適合聯網公共充電項目。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — OCPP becomes mandatory when required by the charge-point operator, public charging tender, fleet owner, EEC-connected site design, or network-management specification; EMC and power-quality evidence are expected for grid coordination
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC vehicle-to-charger communication protocol and is not an OCPP or IEC 61000 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Eswatini networked chargers, confirm OCPP and remote-management requirements at project level and prepare IEC 61000 EMC / power-quality evidence for EEC coordination. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy these interoperability or grid-evidence needs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于埃斯瓦蒂尼联网充电桩，应在项目层面确认OCPP和远程管理要求，并为EEC协调准备IEC 61000 EMC / 电能质量证据。仅GB/T 27930不能满足这些互操作或电网证据需求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於埃斯瓦蒂尼聯網充電樁，應在項目層面確認OCPP和遠程管理要求，並為EEC協調準備IEC 61000 EMC / 電能質量證據。僅GB/T 27930不能滿足這些互操作或電網證據需求。
